title: Karrma Ltd. Set of 4 Spiky Bounce Balls 6.5 CM - Sensory Light Up Balls - Disco Balls Light, Squishy Stress Relief Fidget Squeezy Spikey Ball Toy Specially Kids Party Bag Fillers (Karrma Ltd.)
features: FLASH BALL SPIKY TOY: This Ball is made of high-quality which inserts a flash and can bounce, best for your kids. Bounce to flash and see how high you can make them bounce. It can attract the attention of pets, so you can play with your pets as well.

USE IT EVERYWHERE: This flashing ball is for kids, birthday celebrations, wedding functions, institutions, home or office. Best for parents, teachers, students, therapists and everyone else to relief the stress. You cute pets also love it as it is bouncy.

DURABLE AND INTERESTING: Material is waterproof, tasteless and not easy to be crushed or leave tooth marks. Our flashing balls are firm but can be squeeze and bounce on floor. This light up balls are perfect toy for your little kid.

SATISFACTION: The Colourful pack of 4 Balls can better attract pets' attention. Motion activated (bounce to turn on, flashes for 10-15 seconds before de-activating). This ease-of-use design of flashing toys ensures, that you will come to rely upon it. We believe in the quality of our light up balls for baby and satisfaction of our customers is our top priority.

STRESS Reliever - Spiky Bounce with Sensory Light Up Balls have been a favorite school and therapy prize for a long time. There is a reason for that. Using our balls in a stressful environment can greatly release harmful stress whether it is for a kid who needs a healthy outlet or an adult who is having a stressful day at work. Use it and stay happy.
description: Product Description KARRMA flashing rubber balls are outstanding fidget toys that help to decrease stress levels and calm your mind, while having fun to play with. Comes with brightest LED lights, flash of light up sensory toys flashes for 10-15 seconds before deactivating. This LED light-up spike ball is also quite a suitable toy to play with your dog or cat. It can flash bright lights. If you don't have time to play with your pet, then they can also play with this light up ball themselves happily. Perfect for use at parties, dances and glow party events or for gifting to others in gift bags or presents. A PERFECT DESIGN :- These Bounce balls come with a spiky soft round designs and LED have an auto-off feature and are activated by bouncing them on the floor or squeezing them, meaning they are a great kids ball or for use in night time fun and games. FIRM AND DURABLE :- These KARRMA Spiky flashing balls are firm, durable and strong but also can be squeezed and bounce on the floor. These light up sensory balls are the perfect fidget toy for best sensory and tactile stimulation. PREMIUM QUALITY RUBBER MATERIAL : The KARRMA Spiky Bounce Balls are made of high quality premium rubber material and contain LED lights within the ball that are activated by bouncing on floor or squeezing so it is safe and non-toxic. A PERFECT STRESS RELIEVER : These flashing balls can be used as a perfect stress reliever for kids, at functions, institutions, home or office. Best for parents, teachers, students, therapists and everyone else to relieve the stress. YOUR PET'S FAVORITE TOY : The KARRMA Bounce flashing balls are soft spikes that will softly massage your hands while playing these balls. Help to change someone’s (Especially your pets) attention. Your pets will love to play with this light up ball themselves happily.
